title: NEWS: Alaska Legislature Appoints Task Force to Focus on Education Funding
summary: Anchorage, AK – In May, the Alaska State Legislature overrode a gubernatorial veto to ensure that House Bill 57 would become law. The bill included a $700 increase to base student funding and authorized a multi-year Task Force on Education Funding. The post NEWS: Alaska Legislature Appoints Task For...

title: AST Sexual Abuse: North Pole [AK25056460]
summary: On 06/11/2025, Alaska Wildlife Troopers in Fairbanks assisting Fairbanks AST received a report of sexual abuse. Investigation is on going.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: USDA to Conduct Annual Mushroom Survey
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) will be conducting the annual Mushroom Inquiry to document the past growing year. Mushroom growers will be contacted about growing areas, production, and value of sales for the 2024-2025 season as well as gro...

title: AST SAR: Cordova [AK25056098]
summary: On June 11, 2025, Alaska Wildlife Troopers in Cordova were notified around 1 a.m. that a juvenile male was missing after he wandered away from home several hours earlier. title: AST Deceased person: Fairbanks [AK25056117]
summary: On June 6, 2025, Eleanor McAlister was found deceased at her residence near Amherst. She was discovered unresponsive around 0715 hours. Medical personnel attempted life-saving measures. The SME found no signs of foul play and determined the death was due to natural causes. The body was released to t...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Criminal Mischief: Fairbanks [AK25056109]
summary: On 06/11/2025 at 0435 hours Troopers responded to a burglary alarm at the Oaken Keg near the intersection of University Avenue and College Road. Further investigation revealed someone tried to throw a rock through one of the buildings windows. Damage was sustained to the window, and the suspects had fled the scene. This case is active and ongoing.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: the Oaken Keg near the intersection of University Avenue and College Road
